rationale: Russian strikes killing nine and setting a historic Kyiv cathedral ablaze are a continuation of the established active combat pattern; no qualitative escalation beyond prior baseline.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Deadly Russian air raids on Kyiv killed nine people and destroyed a historic cathedral — a continuation of the established strike pattern causing ongoing civilian casualties and infrastructure damage.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: what still needs to be negotiated
top_events.summary: The ongoing US-Iran deal process continues to absorb US diplomatic attention; no confirmed change in Western military or financial support for Ukraine this cycle.

top_events.title: Seafarers' advocates welcome US-Iran deal after months-long limbo in Gulf
top_events.summary: Reopening of Gulf shipping lanes has no direct impact on Ukraine's war situation but signals a broader geopolitical shift in US focus away from the region.
